name: Morpho Blue
special_mechanism_summary: Morpho Blue is a singleton contract with isolated, immutable markets (five parameters fixed at creation: collateral, loan asset, oracle, IRM, LLTV). Interest accrues as shares that appreciate relative to assets (ERC-4626-style), and each market settles independently with no governance modifiable after deployment.
notes: C3' combination potential: immutable market parameters mean oracle manipulation directly translates to position manipulation with no TWAP delay; borrow shares auto-compound per second, making liquidation prices time-predictable; permissionless market creation allows anyone to deploy a market with a custom oracle Morpho trusts; MetaMorpho vault reallocations shift utilization and rates instantaneously across markets.
